labels.name: epic
labels.description: Umbrella issue; finite epics close when all sub-issues close

labels.name: standing
labels.description: Deprecated alias for ad-hoc; retired after the ad-hoc migration (epic #85)

labels.name: ad-hoc
labels.description: Perpetual umbrella for ad-hoc work; never auto-closes

labels.name: triage
labels.description: Uncurated intake; not yet folded into the epic/task model

labels.name: idea
labels.description: Seed to be expanded into an epic

labels.name: hotfix
labels.description: Emergency fix that skipped formal planning; flagged for retroactive review

labels.name: validation
labels.description: Post-merge validation task: run the checklist, record PASS/FAIL as a comment; never PR-workable, never auto-closed
